'''Lish IV''' was a [[Moon/Legends|moon]] orbiting the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Lish]] in the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]] of the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]].

The close proximity of Lish IV and [[Lish VI]] to [[Lish V]] caused tidal forces on the fifth moon, resulting in a tectonically unstable surface.
